title: Uniblock Token Structure
description: Field-level documentation for the Uniblock Token entity representing fungible token metadata and balance data.

fields.name: chain
fields.description: Blockchain network identifier (e.g., ethereum, polygon, bsc)

fields.name: decimals
fields.description: Number of decimal places (typically 18 for ERC-20)

fields.name: totalSupply
fields.description: Total supply in base units (as string to avoid precision loss)

fields.name: balanceUSD
fields.description: Wallet balance converted to USD at current price

fields.name: logo
fields.description: URL to the token logo image
